programme.title: BKFC 63: Hart vs.Starling
programme.desc: Britain Hart vs. Taylor Starling, strawweight championship; Josh Dyer vs. William Albrecht, light heavyweight; Josh Burns vs. Sam Shewmaker, heavyweight. From Sturgis Buffalo Chip in Sturgis, S.D. on Aug. 3, 2024.

programme.title: BKFC 41 Colorado: Perry vs. Rockhold
programme.desc: Mike Perry vs. Luke Rockhold, light heavyweight bout; Christine Ferea vs. Bec Rawlings, women's flyweight championship bout. From 1stBank Center in Broomfield, Colo.

programme.title: Hitman Fight League
programme.desc: From Indigo at the O2 in London.

programme.title: Bellator vs. Rizin 2
programme.desc: From July 29, 2023. Featuring Patricio Pitbull vs. Roberto de Souza, plus Kyoji Horgiuchi vs. Makoto Shinryu for the vacant Bellator Flyweight Championship.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: BELLATOR champ Vadim Nemkov, Phil Davis, Corey Anderson in action.

programme.title: BKFC 48: Albuquerque - Dodson vs. Ridge
programme.desc: John Dodson vs. Joshua Ridge, flyweight championship bout; Joshua Moreno vs. Jeremy Sauceda, middleweight bout. From Tingly Coliseum in Albuquerque, N.M.

programme.title: BKFC 62
programme.desc: Kai Stewart vs. Bryan Duran, featherweight title bout; Keith Richardson vs. Alberto Blas, championship bout; Jared Warren vs. Jomi Escoboza, light heavyweight title bout. From Hollywood, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC 42 Greenville: Soto vs. Goodjohn
programme.desc: Antonio Soto III vs. Tyler Goodjohn, lightweights; Doug Coltrane vs. Blake LaCaze, middleweights. From Bon Secours Wellness Arena in Greenville, S.C.

programme.desc: Warriors Cup is the sole US partner of ONE Championship, featuring top Muay Thai athletes from across America and around the world!

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Juan "The Spaniard" Archuleta (25-2) makes the first defense of his Bellator MMA Bantamweight World Championship against Sergio "S.P." Pettis (20-5) in a five-round main event. From May 7, 2021 at Mohegan Sun Casino, Uncasville, Conn.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Cris Cyborg takes on Leslie Smith in the main event from Mohegan Sun Arena in Uncasville, Conn. Cyborg and Smith first fought in the UFC in 2016. From May 21, 2021.

programme.desc: The 2026 National Team Trials Presented by The North Face Men's & Women's Boulder Round 3.

programme.title: Beat Monday
programme.sub-title: Death Valley to Mt. Whitney: Lowest to Highest
programme.desc: Mike and Jason take on the infamous Mount Whitney Lowest to Highest.

programme.title: Beat Monday
programme.desc: Mike and Jason head out on a hiking and pack rafting mission of the Sawtooth Range in central Idaho.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County Search & Rescue races to save a teen who drove a snowmobile off a cliff.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: A snowboarder is caught in a high-risk avalanche zone. SAR braves the sliding terrain for a risky extraction.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton rescuers Chris and Dee Hattaway's roles collide when treating a skier with a suspected spinal injury.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County SAR faces its toughest day yet: a lost hiker, a snowmobile crash, and an avalanche.

programme.title: Get a Little Out There with Alex Honnold
programme.desc: Pro climbers Alex Honnold and Cedar Wright battle wind and a surprise snowstorm in Great Basin National Park.

programme.title: Get a Little Out There with Alex Honnold
programme.desc: Alex Honnold joins endurance runner Peyton Thomas for an unexpected adventure in the Ruby Mountains.

programme.title: Over the Horizon
programme.desc: The long history of The Marshall Islands during and post WW2 draws Ellis Emmett to its shores.

programme.title: 10:00am on a Tuesday
programme.sub-title: A Day in the Climbing Life
programme.desc: Behind the scenes look at an "average" weekday with professional climber Sasha DiGiulian.

programme.title: Khanh Ong’s Wild Food
programme.desc: Chef Khanh Ongs explores Southern Tasmania and braves the Pacific Ocean in search of Southern Bluefin Tuna.

programme.desc: Location: TURKS & CAICOS / BIMINI. While island-hopping in the Caribbean, Scott and Ellis meet the 'Dive God'.

programme.title: Locals
programme.desc: Benji Weatherley and Erik Roner tow-in surf to chase big waves off the coast of Encinitas.

programme.title: Locals
programme.desc: Things get dicey when Sage Cattabriga-Alosa gets stuck in a chute. Can he get out?

programme.title: Adventure Cities
programme.desc: Jonathan Thompson dives into Belfast, Ireland, seeking out its most thrilling adventure travel experiences.

programme.title: Adventure Cities
programme.desc: Jonathan Thompson journeys to Sydney, Australia, in search of the most unforgettable adventure experiences.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.desc: Ken Whiting explores Ireland's West Coast and the adventures by kayak along the Wild Atlantic Way.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.desc: Ken Whiting kayaks along Ireland's Giant's Causeway Coast near Derry and Strangford Lough outside Belfast.
